title: Thunder on the Hill
writer: Oscar Saul, Andrew Solt, Charlotte Hastings
actors: Claudette Colbert, Ann Blyth, Robert Douglas
plot: Convicted murderess Valerie Carns (Ann Blyth) is being transported to Norwich to be executed when a flood strands her and her guards at a convent hospital. Nurse Sister Mary (Claudette Colbert) becomes convinced of her innocence a...
